name: PF: The Economic Restoration Plan
objective: Engage voters on the rising cost of living and present the PF vision for affordable essentials.
mainMessage: Bringing back affordability: We delivered the roads and hospitals, now we will bring back affordable food and fuel.
talkingPoints: Cost of Mealie Meal: We will stabilize prices.
Resuming suspended projects: No more 'stalled' construction.
Experience matters: We know how to run a social protection model.
Empowerment: Direct support for local traders without over-taxation.

questions.prompt: Are you finding the current price of mealie meal and fuel manageable?
Which PF infrastructure project in your ward do you value most?
How likely are you to vote for the PF to restore economic stability?
